passives.name: Annul
passives.effects: Grants a {{tip|spell shield}} that blocks the next hostile ability (60 second cooldown, timer restarts upon taking damage from champions).

effects_structured.raw: Spell shield blocks next hostile ability. Cooldown 60s (restarts on champion damage taken).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Annul maintains a single-instance spell shield that blocks the next hostile ability, then starts a 60-second cooldown.
Timing model: taking champion damage restarts the cooldown timer, delaying shield return during sustained combat.
Page-level note: Annul is placed on cooldown on death and has clone-interaction behavior when clones spawn while the shield is active.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
